// Code generated by github.com/romshark/datapages; DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import "strings"

// POSTPageOrgInvite references /org/{org}/member/{id}/invite/
func POSTPageOrgInvite(org string, id string) string {
	var b strings.Builder
	b.Grow(len("@post('/org/") + len(org) + len("/member/") + len(id) + len("/invite/')"))
	b.WriteString("@post('/org/")
	b.WriteString(org)
	b.WriteString("/member/")
	b.WriteString(id)
	b.WriteString("/invite/')")
	return b.String()
}
